calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Continued To Jun-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT HALL MORTGAGE FUND, LP DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

is CONTINUED to June 26, 2026 at 9:30 a.m., for the opposing party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the opposition no later than June 4, 2026 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (Moving papers and reply received.)

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-26-681021 WITH CASE CGC-26-632692
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RENEE ALEXANDRIA SMITH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO STAY PROCEEDINGS

Appearances: Sarah Shapero of the Shapero Law Firm (415.273.3504) for plaintiff and moving party; Mark Chernev of Zacks & Freedman, PC (415.956.8100) for Hall Mortgage Fund, LP (plaintiff in CUD-26-681021)

Hearing held on plaintiff's Motion to Consolidate CUD-26-681021 and CGC-26-632692, addressing (1) property taxes, due dates and amounts; and (2) property insurance, due date and amount. The court grants the motion to consolidate for all purposes. CGC-26-632692, Smith v. Hall Mortgage Fund, LP, shall be designated the lead case. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
